outcome.notes: Calculation flow via keyboard worked end to end (typed 3, selected operator -, typed -2, pressed Enter on Calculate -> Result: 5). Step 5 failed: the result field did not clear. It stayed populated when typing in or clearing any of the number fields. Pass criterion 'clearing an input resets the result' is not met.

steps.description: Result field did not clear. Clearing/editing any number field (Cmd+A + Delete on first number, or typing in any number field) left the previous result displayed instead of resetting to the empty state.
